result.title: Akron Captures Third Consecutive MAC Tournament Title with 79-76 ...

result.title: Akron will take third straight trip to March Madness as MAC champion
result.snippet: The University of Akron men's basketball team won its third consecutive MAC Tournament championship. Akron's Shammah Scott made a game-winning 3-pointer with 6.0 seconds left to secure a 79-76 victory over Toledo. Akron is the first team to win three straight MAC Men's Basketball Tournament titles ...

pick.rationale: Duke's elite defensive efficiency, ranked #1 nationally with an adjusted defensive rating of 88.7, should overwhelm Akron's offense despite the Zips' impressive MAC Tournament championship run. While Akron has momentum from winning their third consecutive MAC title behind clutch performances from Shammah Scott, the talent and depth gap is substantial with Duke holding a 31-2 record and massive advantages in both offensive (128.0 vs 117.4) and defensive efficiency metrics. The Blue Devils' combination of size, athleticism, and tournament experience as a 1-seed should prove too much for the 16-seed Zips to overcome in what projects as a comfortable Duke victory.

reasoningStep.title: Duke vs Akron Round of 32 Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Duke holds overwhelming advantages in talent, metrics, and tournament seeding as the #1 overall team facing a 16-seed MAC champion
evidence: Duke ranked #1 in both Torvik and KenPom with elite defensive efficiency (88.7 adjusted)
Akron ranked #64-68 nationally with significantly lower efficiency ratings on both ends
Duke enters with 31-2 record as East Region 1-seed
Akron won third straight MAC Tournament title but faces massive step up in competition
No reported major injuries for either team affecting the matchup
